title: Women secretly filmed, then ridiculed and abused online
summary_full: Women in Kenya and Ghana tell the BBC about being approached by a Russian man who later posts videos of them without their consent.
summary_public: Women in Kenya and Ghana tell the BBC about being approached by a Russian man who later posts videos of them without their consent.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russian man who later posts videos of them without consent.
